product: Hugging Face Inference Providers routed requests
billing_notes: Hugging Face Inference Providers routed requests are billed at provider pass-through rates with no additional Hugging Face markup, according to the pricing documentation.
Pricing is model/provider-specific when a routed provider mapping exists for the model.
This exact model currently has an empty inferenceProviderMapping from the Hugging Face model API, so there are no routed-provider prices to record for it.
This does not describe the dedicated Hugging Face Inference Endpoint used for our benchmark; that endpoint is a separate product billed by provisioned hardware/runtime time.
